_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine if cybersecurity inspections, tests, and reviews are coordinated for the network environment
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.452), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.427).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.503). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [coordinated, cybersecurity, determine, environment, inspections, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.883, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 13-word NICE element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Determine if cybersecurity inspections, tests, and reviews are coordinated for t" and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.472 ≈ STS 0.503 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.2%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [coordinated, cybersecurity, determine, environment, inspections, network]. WIDAI terms: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
